titleStmt.title: SII 30.211: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 211. (A.R. No. 286 of 1915.) Vikravāṇḍi, Villuppuram Taluk, South Arcot District. Bhuvanēśvara temple-on the north, west and south walls of the central shrine Vikrama-Chōḷa: year 4: 1122 A.D.

summary.p: Incomplete. This record contains only the praśasti of the king and his regnal year.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmālaimiṭaintu poṉmālai tikaḻtarap pāmālai malinta parumaṇit tiraḷpuyat tirunila maṭantaiyoṭu jayamakaḷiruppak kaṉavarai mārvan=taṉateṉap peṟṟa tirumakaḷorutaniyiruppak kalaimakaḷ coṟṟiṟam puṇar kaṟpiṉa virupporuḷ nāvakaṟṟiruppa Akilapuvaṉamuṅ kavintator putumatipol veṇkuṭai mimicai niṟpat ticaitoṟun=tikiri yoṭuṅ ceṅkol naṭappak karuṅ
kaliyoḷittu Avanipilattiṭaik kiṭappak kuḷattiṭait teluṅkavimaṉ vilaṅkal micaiyeṟavuṅ kaliṅkar pūmiyaik kaṉaleri parukavum Aimpaṭaip paruvattu vempaṭaittāṅki veṅkai maṇṭalat tāṅkiṉitiru vaṭaticai Aṭippaṭuttaruḷic ten=ticait tarumamun=tavamun=tāṉamun=tataḻaippa vetamum meymaiyu mātiyukam polat talaittalai ciṟappa van=taruḷi velaṟkaruṅ koypuliyāṇai pārttivar cūṭa niṟaimaṇi makuṭamuṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭi mannu
yiṟkellā minnuyirttāypolat taṉoḷi parappit taṉittaṉi puran=tera kkoyiṟkoṟṟavācaṟpurattu maṇināvoṭuṅki muraicukaḷ muḻaṅka vicaiyamum pukaḻum menmeloṅkac ceḻiyar veñcurampukac ceralar kaṭalpuka vaḻitaruciṅkaṇarañci neñcalamarak kaṅkar tiṟaiyiṭa kanṉāṭar venniṭak koṅkarotuṅkak koṅkaṇar maṟṟetticai mannarun=tamakkaraṇenat tirumalaṟ cevaṭiyurimaiyiliyaṟaiñcit tollai yeḻulakun toḻat
toṉṟi mullai vāṇakai mukkokkiḻāṉaṭiyu maiyoṭucaṅkaranimaiyat tiruntateṉap poruntiyuṭaṉinitiruppa Āṅkavaṉ makiḻuṅ kaṅkaiyoppākiya terivaiyar tilatan=tiyākapatākai purikuḻal maṭappiṭi puṉitakuṇa vaṉitai tiripuvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷuṭan tiruvuḷḷattaruḷ muḻutuṭaiyāḷuṭan cemponvirasimhāsaṉattu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecaripanmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakraravarttikaḷ śrīvikkiramacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 Āvatu kaṅkaiko
Digital edition of SII 30.211 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
